## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the structure of product review pages for Dimmo's website, focusing on content organization, SEO optimization, and user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Proposed a new structure for product review pages with expandable sections to balance comprehensive content and user-friendly design](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Agreed to create summarized content for each section with "Read More" options to reveal detailed information](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Discussed the importance of adding unique elements like screenshots and user experiences to improve SEO and avoid potential Google penalties](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Planned to implement internal linking strategies to improve site structure and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Topics

### Product Review Page Structure

  - [Prateek presented a comprehensive structure for product review pages, including company overview, pricing, features, integrations, and competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Troy suggested restructuring the content to make it more digestible, proposing expandable sections for each topic](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Agreed on creating a template with H2 headers and short summaries, with detailed content accessible via "Read More" buttons](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Discussed adding table of contents-style jump links to improve navigation](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Prateek emphasized the importance of comprehensive content for ranking, while balancing user experience](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Discussed the need to avoid appearing as AI-generated content to prevent potential Google penalties](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Agreed on the importance of adding unique elements like screenshots and user experiences to improve EAT (Expertise, Authority, Trustworthiness)](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### Content Generation and Management

  - [Discussed the challenge of sourcing authentic screenshots and user experiences for products](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [Proposed using AI to identify key features from video content and automatically capture relevant screenshots](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Planned to migrate existing articles into specific directories and implement internal linking strategies](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

### Author Profiles and Dynamic Content

  - [Lucas clarified that author profiles are currently set statically to Troy](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Discussed the relative importance of dynamic author profiles for SEO, with Prateek noting that Google can detect artificial author creation](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [Prateek suggested adding two sections of internal links at the bottom of each article:](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
    1.  Links to articles about the same product
    2.  Links to articles in the same category (e.g., features, alternatives)

## Next Steps

  - Troy and Lucas to review and finalize H2 headers for product review pages
  - [Prateek to create a template for writers with short summaries and detailed content for each section](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Lucas to implement dynamic author updates from the CMS](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Lucas to migrate existing articles into specific directories](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [Team to explore options for adding authentic screenshots and user experiences to review pages](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Implement internal linking strategy at the bottom of each article](https://fathom.video/share/N3ucygs4Qzjx7ZY4onZBbg-SJ7YxusVm?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
